response.justification: Fifteen-plus years of fullstack work with current hands-on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK at Optilyz and re:cinq aligns closely with the primary stack; the AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq directly addresses the increasingly important AI agent requirement. The main gaps are the absence of any Nest.js mention and limited visibility into Vitest/Playwright usage, but the breadth and seniority of the profile make those learnable rather than disqualifying.
strengths: Primary stack coverage: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS all demonstrated across recent roles
Active AI agent and MCP framework development at current position directly matches the role's AI agent requirement
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, testing library author (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and workshop facilitator
concerns: Nest.js — the specified backend framework — is absent from the resume entirely
Kotlin/Java exposure is minimal, brief, and dates back to 2016–2018
Vitest and Playwright are not explicitly listed despite an otherwise strong testing background
